revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-3-200

Light-Centre-Length (of an incandescent electric lamp or discharge lamp)

The distance between the geometric centre of the luminous element and a specified plane of location on a cap.

[[Image:Ch2_Fig27.jpg|400px|border]]
